prompt:
A clean modern wellness-brand infographic poster on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Inspired by the side-panel infographic style of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (chevron callouts + icons + teal/gold accents on deep ink-black type — see provided reference image).

Topic: 'NATURE'S MINERAL POWERHOUSE' — an infographic showing the rich mineral profile of sea moss.

LAYOUT:
  • TOP — header block: small brand lockup centered (DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies teal+gold mini-logo). Below it, a bold ALL-CAPS headline 'NATURE'S MINERAL POWERHOUSE' in deep ink-black. Sub-headline in lighter weight: 'Sea moss contains 92 of the 102 essential minerals your body needs.' Thin gold horizontal rule beneath.
  • CENTER — A LARGE CENTRAL CIRCULAR DIAGRAM: a hand-drawn ink-line illustration of a sea moss frond/bunch in the middle of a circle, surrounded by 8 SMALL CHEVRON-SHAPED CALLOUT TABS arranged around the circle's perimeter (matching the chevron style from the jar's side panel). Each chevron contains a small bold all-caps mineral abbreviation (Fe, Mg, Ca, K, Zn, I, Cu, Se) in teal/cyan, with a small flat icon and the full name below in light gray (IRON, MAGNESIUM, CALCIUM, POTASSIUM, ZINC, IODINE, COPPER, SELENIUM). The chevrons point inward toward the sea moss illustration in the center.
  • LOWER MIDDLE — three short benefit pills in a row: 'PLANT-BASED' · 'VEGAN' · 'NON-GMO' — each in a teal-outlined pill with a small flat teal icon.
  • BOTTOM — footer strip: small disclaimer in light gray, tiny product rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar from the provided reference image on the right edge with the brand name beside it.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK for body type, warm-gray for sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines, clean modern sans-serif for body text. NO script fonts.
  • Icons: flat outlined single-color teal/cyan, consistent stroke weight.
  • Spacing: generous breathing room.
  • Style: editorial wellness-brand infographic — Athletic Greens / Hims / Goop product-page aesthetic.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided image for brand color/type/icon-style language and the small product rendering in the footer.
